auto_resolutions.question: Phase II/III rerun (job b0ao4zigu) is still running concurrently with Phase IV-A initialization
auto_resolutions.resolution: Proceed with Phase IV-A. The work is additive (writes to results/weighted_lse_dp/phase4/). The audit step will use Phase III results that exist at audit time. Phase IV-A code path is independent of Phase III outputs except for the compatibility audit.
